name: Caesar Artichoke Swirls
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and chop the artichoke hearts.
2. Mix the chopped artichokes with feta cheese, dressing, parsley, and pepper.
3. Trim the crusts from the bread slices.
4. Spread 2 tablespoons of the filling mixture over each slice of bread.
5. Roll up each slice tightly.
6. Cover the rolls with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or overnight. Each roll will yield about 6 swirls.
